title: trifolium brachycalycinum
intro: Trifolium brachycalycinum, also known as the short-petaled clover, is a species of clover that belongs to the legume family. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, and is traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Trifolium brachycalycinum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Trifolium brachycalycinum can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and are often used to support overall well-being and promote relaxation.
